category_sources: source_facts.description says lldpd is an implementation of IEEE 802.1ab LLDP.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lldpd; official website title uses lldpd.
docs_sources: Official lldpd website is the main documentation surface; its Usage page documents the daemon and client manual pages.
repo_sources: Official lldpd GitHub organization lists lldpd/lldpd as the public repository; the official website links to GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IEEE 802.1ab LLDP; official Usage page says lldpd includes a daemon and lldpcli client.
